notes: Solid Asteroids implementation with proper wrapping, UFO, hyperspace, audio, and level progression; minor issue with UFO vy calculation using direct assignment instead of additive movement causing erratic vertical behavior.
Great implementation overall, but the UFO wraps around the screen instead of despawning, and destroying the UFO fails to stop its audio node, causing the UFO sound to play forever.

A solid recognizable Asteroids clone with levels, UFO, hyperspace, and scoring, but it has notable logic/polish issues such as single-shot Space handling, questionable UFO wrapping/despawn behavior, and likely runtime failure risk from unguarded localStorage access.
